## Problem

## Which part of the system

- [ ] Contract (the crawler / FetchContext interface)
- [ ] Registry (versions, audit trail, on-disk crawler files)
- [ ] Loop (sampling, oracle, codegen, gauntlet, promotion)
- [ ] Validator (correctness gates)
- [ ] Access (rate limiting, strategy ladder, recovery)
- [ ] Schemas / router / engine / CLI
- [ ] Other
